raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaration of ongoing behavioral commitment to service and principled conduct following claimed personal transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The 12 steps produce a spiritual awakening",
    "Carrying the message to alcoholics is an appropriate and effective action",
    "The principles derived from the steps can and should be practiced in all areas of life",
    "The speaker has undergone (or is reporting) such an awakening"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent within a recovery-program logic that links personal change to outward action; minor tension exists between the past-tense 'tried' and the implied ongoing commitment",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The steps and principles must be clearly defined and beneficial; the audience must be receptive to the message; the speaker must be acting in good faith without coercion",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The claimed awakening is fabricated or exaggerated; the 'principles' contain harmful content; the statement is used to pressure others or evade accountability"
}
